label: Project Health
detail: Overall project health is stable but schedule and GMP readiness require active management.

label: Schedule Progress
detail: Actual progress is 68% against planned 74%. Focus recovery on Utilities and Cleanroom fit-out.

label: Safety Performance
detail: No lost time incidents recorded. PPE compliance is trending at 96%.

label: GMP Readiness
detail: GMP readiness is progressing, but documentation, CQV packages, and cleanroom closeout require attention.

label: Open Risks
detail: There are 7 active risks, including 2 high-severity risks requiring management attention.

label: CQV Progress
detail: CQV activities have started for utilities and process systems.

label: Turnover Readiness
detail: System turnover packages are being prepared.
